settings.title: We Now Handle End-of-Tenancy Cleans
settings.excerpt: Moving out is stressful enough without scrubbing an oven at midnight, so we have built a service around getting deposits back.
settings.body:
Moving day is chaos, and the deep clean a landlord expects is the last thing anyone has energy for. So Sparkhaus now offers a dedicated end-of-tenancy service.

We work to the checklist most letting agents use: inside the oven, behind appliances, limescale off the bathroom, skirting boards, and the insides of every cupboard.

You get an itemised list of what we cleaned, which is exactly the kind of evidence that helps when a deposit is in question.

Book it for the day after your furniture leaves, and hand back a property that gives the agent nothing to argue with.
